title: Garlic Sherry Sunday
description: A savory and crispy Uruguayan dish infused with sherry vinegar for a lazy Sunday treat that is egg-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: Garlic Cloves
ingredients.notes: Mince after peeling and drying on paper towels

instructions: Mince the garlic cloves and set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together sherry vinegar, minced garlic, paprika powder, salt, vegetable oil, and flour. Mix until evenly combined.
Transfer the mixture onto baking sheets lined with parchment paper for easy cleanup.
Spread the mixture out in thin, even layers on the baking sheet to ensure crispy results.
Bake in preheated oven for about 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and crispy. Flip halfway through cooking time for evenly caramelized edges.
Allow to cool slightly before serving. Enjoy your Garlic Sherry Sunday!
